title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
